title: Fix develop CI failures from 2026-04-13 runs
description: Recover Plexus CI/CD Pipeline failures on run 24370882488 (dashboard npm ci lock mismatch + 4 Python test failures).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Initial triage complete. Failing run: 24370882488. Root causes: (1) dashboard npm ci fails because dashboard/package.json and package-lock.json are out of sync (lockfile mismatch with @aws-sdk/@smithy graph), (2) Python tests fail in both 3.11 and 3.12 with 4 deterministic failures: three in plexus/cli/procedure/service_test.py due stale score-resolution mocks and one in task_progress_tracker_comprehensive_test.py due outdated stage message expectations.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Progress: Implemented CI remediation for run 24370882488. Updated dashboard/package-lock.json to match package.json and verified cd dashboard && npm ci --include=optional passes. Updated stale test mocks in plexus/cli/procedure/service_test.py to patch direct identifier resolution path used by create_procedure. Updated stage-message expectations in plexus/cli/shared/task_progress_tracker_comprehensive_test.py to current strings (Generating predictions..., Analyzing results...). Local validation: targeted 4 failing tests all passed; workflow-equivalent command uvx --from poetry poetry run invoke ci passed (3059 passed, 41 skipped, 3 xfailed). Next: commit + push develop and confirm CI/CD Pipeline green.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Update after push run 24372084938: CI uncovered an additional failure in Dashboard Unit Tests (job 71177754476): components/__tests__/TaskDisplay.test.tsx had a brittle global .animate-pulse count assertion. Fixed test to target score-results skeleton rows specifically (.animate-pulse.rounded-lg.bg-card-light). Local revalidation: cd dashboard && npm run ci:unit passed (51 suites, 418 tests). Next: commit this test fix and re-push develop.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Progress update: follow-up commit 6272022d7 is on develop for dashboard unit-test selector stabilization.

Current GitHub status:
- CI/CD Pipeline run 24372503898 is still in progress on develop.

Local validation already completed earlier:
- dashboard npm ci --include=optional ✅
- targeted failing Python tests ✅
- invoke ci ✅
- dashboard ci:unit ✅

Will close after the run turns green.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Final verification: CI/CD Pipeline run 24372503898 (head 6272022d7) is SUCCESS on develop. Closing issue.
